# Project README

This project provides a set of utilities for text processing
and formatting.

## Features

- Word wrapping at configurable column widths with Unicode
  support
- Paragraph detection and preservation of blank lines
  between sections
- Code block preservation for fenced and indented code

## Usage

```bash
npm install lumpia
```

Then import and use:

```typescript
import { rollText } from "lumpia";
const wrapped = rollText(text, 80);
```

## Configuration

| Option  | Default | Description          |
|---------|---------|----------------------|
| column  | 80      | Target column width  |

> Note: All functions are pure and side-effect free.
